mapper.select: /* SQL ID : QstnVwitmDAO.qstnVwitmList 설 명 : 문항보기항목목록조회 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_QSTN_VWITM WHERE QSTN_ID = #{qstnId} ORDER BY QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO

/* SQL ID : QstnVwitmDAO.qstnVwitmBulkList 설 명 : 문항보기항목일괄목록조회 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_QSTN_VWITM WHERE QSTN_ID IN (SELECT QSTN_ID FROM TB_LMS_QSTN WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId}) ORDER BY QSTN_ID, QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO
mapper.delete: /* SQL ID : QstnVwitmDAO.qstnVwitmAllDelete 설 명 : 문항보기항목전체삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_QSTN_VWITM WHERE QSTN_ID IN ( SELECT QSTN_ID FROM TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN WHERE QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} )
